_comment: Copy this file to config/runtime_profile.local.json and customize for your machine. Keys here are merged on top of config/runtime_profile.json at startup. Only override what you need.

auth._comment: Set enabled=true and supply tokens to protect the API when binding beyond loopback.

providers._comment: Remove providers you do not have credentials for. 'openchimera-gateway' and 'local-llama-cpp' work without any API keys.

launcher._comment: Set llama_server_path to the absolute path of your llama-server binary. Leave empty to skip local model launching.

external_roots._comment: Override any external integration roots here. Paths are relative to the workspace root unless absolute. All are optional.
